'''鈭歵h-s-zh''' ('''thasazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:photodisrupt|photodisrupt]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-s-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:photodisrupt|photodisrupt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-s-zh
|-
! Lemma
| thasazha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thasazhithi|thasazhithi]] || [[word:thasazhiji|thasazhiji]] || [[word:thasazhishi|thasazhishi]] || [[word:thasazhi|thasazhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thasazhuthuth|thasazhuthuth]] || [[word:thasazhujuj|thasazhujuj]] || [[word:thasazhushush|thasazhushush]] || [[word:thasazh|thasazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasazhuthu|thasazhuthu]] || [[word:thasazhuju|thasazhuju]] || [[word:thasazhushu|thasazhushu]] || [[word:thasazhu|thasazhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasazhufuth|thasazhufuth]] || [[word:thasazhufuj|thasazhufuj]] || [[word:thasazhufush|thasazhufush]] || [[word:thasazhuf|thasazhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thasazhethe|thasazhethe]] || [[word:thasazheje|thasazheje]] || [[word:thasazheshe|thasazheshe]] || [[word:thasazhe|thasazhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thasazhothoth|thasazhothoth]] || [[word:thasazhojoj|thasazhojoj]] || [[word:thasazhoshosh|thasazhoshosh]] || [[word:thasazh|thasazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasazhotho|thasazhotho]] || [[word:thasazhojo|thasazhojo]] || [[word:thasazhosho|thasazhosho]] || [[word:thasazho|thasazho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasazhofoth|thasazhofoth]] || [[word:thasazhofoj|thasazhofoj]] || [[word:thasazhofosh|thasazhofosh]] || [[word:thasazhof|thasazhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thasazh忙th忙|thasazh忙th忙]] || [[word:thasazh忙j忙|thasazh忙j忙]] || [[word:thasazh忙sh忙|thasazh忙sh忙]] || [[word:thasazh忙|thasazh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thasazhathath|thasazhathath]] || [[word:thasazhajaj|thasazhajaj]] || [[word:thasazhashash|thasazhashash]] || [[word:thasazh|thasazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasazhatha|thasazhatha]] || [[word:thasazhaja|thasazhaja]] || [[word:thasazhasha|thasazhasha]] || [[word:thasazha|thasazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasazhafath|thasazhafath]] || [[word:thasazhafaj|thasazhafaj]] || [[word:thasazhafash|thasazhafash]] || [[word:thasazhaf|thasazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:thasazhasha|thasazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gothasazhasha|gothasazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokithasazhasha|gokithasazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:thasazhn眉sha|thasazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gothasazhnkn眉sha|gothasazhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokithasazhn眉sha|gokithasazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thasazhsh毛sha|thasazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothasazhnksh毛sha|gothasazhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithasazhsh毛sha|gokithasazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thasazhrosha|thasazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothasazhnkrosha|gothasazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithasazhrosha|gokithasazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thasazhmusha|thasazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothasazhnkmusha|gothasazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithasazhmusha|gokithasazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:thasazhsherasha|thasazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gothasazhnksherasha|gothasazhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokithasazhsherasha|gokithasazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:thasazhngasha|thasazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gothasazhnkngasha|gothasazhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokithasazhngasha|gokithasazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thasazhyasha|thasazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothasazhnkyasha|gothasazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokithasazhyasha|gokithasazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:thasazhyamasha|thasazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gothasazhnkyamasha|gothasazhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokithasazhyamasha|gokithasazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:thasazhn眉sh毛sha|thasazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothasazhnkn眉sh毛sha|gothasazhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithasazhn眉sh毛sha|gokithasazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thasazhn眉rosha|thasazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothasazhnkn眉rosha|gothasazhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithasazhn眉rosha|gokithasazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thasazhn眉musha|thasazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothasazhnkn眉musha|gothasazhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithasazhn眉musha|gokithasazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:thasazhsh毛n眉sha|thasazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothasazhnksh毛n眉sha|gothasazhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithasazhsh毛n眉sha|gokithasazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thasazhsh毛rosha|thasazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothasazhnksh毛rosha|gothasazhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithasazhsh毛rosha|gokithasazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thasazhsh毛musha|thasazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothasazhnksh毛musha|gothasazhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithasazhsh毛musha|gokithasazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:thasazhron眉sha|thasazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothasazhnkron眉sha|gothasazhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithasazhron眉sha|gokithasazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:thasazhrosh毛sha|thasazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothasazhnkrosh毛sha|gothasazhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithasazhrosh毛sha|gokithasazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thasazhromusha|thasazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothasazhnkromusha|gothasazhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithasazhromusha|gokithasazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:thasazhmun眉sha|thasazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothasazhnkmun眉sha|gothasazhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithasazhmun眉sha|gokithasazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:thasazhmush毛sha|thasazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothasazhnkmush毛sha|gothasazhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithasazhmush毛sha|gokithasazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thasazhmurosha|thasazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothasazhnkmurosha|gothasazhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithasazhmurosha|gokithasazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:thasazh|thasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:th忙s忙zh|th忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hothasazh|hothasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoth忙s忙zh|hoth忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohothasazh|hohothasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoth忙s忙zh|hohoth忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉thasazh|n眉thasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉th忙s忙zh|n眉th忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉thasazh|n眉n眉thasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉th忙s忙zh|n眉n眉th忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂thasazh|n茂thasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂th忙s忙zh|n茂th忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂thasazh|n茂n茂thasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂th忙s忙zh|n茂n茂th忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luthasazh|luthasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luth忙s忙zh|luth忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluthasazh|luluthasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluth忙s忙zh|luluth忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lithasazh|lithasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lith忙s忙zh|lith忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilithasazh|lilithasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilith忙s忙zh|lilith忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kothasazh|kothasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koth忙s忙zh|koth忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokothasazh|kokothasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoth忙s忙zh|kokoth忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kethasazh|kethasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keth忙s忙zh|keth忙s忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekethasazh|kekethasazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketh忙s忙zh|keketh忙s忙zh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
